title: 大阪杯の後に・遥かに高い走り

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: That was an outstanding race, Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
That's why we call you the Hot Rod!
Congratulations on first place!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Thanks a lot! Your cheering helped make it a
great race!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll be leading the pack in the next one too, so
keep those cheers coming, homies! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Why are they laughing? Is calling people
"homie" not hip anymore?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Did you catch my flawless victory?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Did you catch my flawless victory?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You thought so too, huh? ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You thought so too, huh? ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's thanks to Rudolf that the race was so exciting,
though.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That intensity I felt during our race... I definitely
want to feel it again.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I hope for the same.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That was a brilliant race, Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks! You were great, too!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You said that you wanted to show the younger
students something worth chasing after, correct?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I didn't realize I would be shown something that even I would want to chase after...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Let's meet on the turf again someday. Next time, it will be my turn to show you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! We'll keep pushing each other
forward, as rivals!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Precisely!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an admirable performance against Symboli
Rudolf, our next goal is the Yasuda Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky was...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: She was amazing...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yeah...
